name: browser-extension-test-data
description: Real-world browser-extension corpus + automated QA testbed: vendored, validated samples from MDN, Chrome, Chromium, and Extension.js (see catalog.json), built weekly against the published Extension.js CLI.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/vendor.mjs --check && node scripts/discover.mjs --vendored && node scripts/run-matrix.mjs --tier raw --browsers chrome,firefox --limit 12 && node scripts/report.mjs --no-baseline && node scripts/status.mjs
scripts.qa: node scripts/sync.mjs && node scripts/discover.mjs && npm run matrix && node scripts/report.mjs --markdown && node scripts/status.mjs
